description: End the conversation. Equivalent to hanging up or leaving the room.
parameters: {"last_message":"The last message the player will see before the scene ends."}

description: Sector-wide price check for a single commodity. Requires a comm relay in range. Returns the best-paying markets currently buying the commodity.
Returns price, stock, and shortage/excess status for every commodity on the local market. No parameters needed.
The npc can buy a commodity from the player
parameters: {"commodity_name":"The name of the commodity to buy from the player.", amount:"Integer, the amount of commodities to buy."

description: The npc can sell a commodity from the player - if they have enough credits
parameters: {"commodity_name":"The name of the commodity to sell to the player.", amount:"Integer, the amount of commodities to sell."
